---
title: "Pipeline hub"
subtitle: "Choose the right inference path, then dive into guides and notebooks"
---

::: {.hero-kicker}
Pipelines
:::

smol-doc-analyzer ships **two complementary inference chains**. Use this page
as the map; each card links to design notes, CLI usage, and rendered notebooks.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
  Q{Need paper Fig. 1<br/>medical / salvage<br/>image-first flow?}
  Q -->|Yes| DICIE[DICIE · src/docie/]
  Q -->|No — need memos / ACORD intake| MEMO[Memo chain · src/pipeline/]
  DICIE --> DN[Notebook: DICIE walkthrough]
  MEMO --> MN[Notebook: Pipeline walkthrough]
```

## DICIE — Document Image Classification & Information Extraction

::::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">DICIE</span>
### [Design notes](../docie_pipeline.qmd)
Stages, taxonomies, review gates, FastAPI serve shape.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">Notebook</span>
### [DICIE walkthrough](../notebooks/docie_pipeline_walkthrough.ipynb)
Stage-by-stage demo with page images and stored outputs.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">CLI</span>
### [Usage · DICIE](../usage.md)
`python -m src.docie` batch + response-only recipes.
:::

:::::

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Document Processing] --> B[Classification]
  B --> C[Information Extraction]
  C --> D[Aggregate / respond]
```

## Memo chain — markdown → classify → extract → vision → summarize

::::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">Memo</span>
### [Architecture](../architecture.qmd)
Chronological reaction contract and markdown conversion.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">Notebook</span>
### [Pipeline walkthrough](../notebooks/pipeline_walkthrough.ipynb)
End-to-end memo-chain analysis with figures.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
<span class="pipeline-badge">CLI</span>
### [Usage · orchestrator](../usage.md)
`python -m src.pipeline.orchestrator` and batch_runner.
:::

:::::

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[to_markdown] --> B[classify]
  B --> C[extract]
  C --> D[vision_llm]
  D --> E[summarize]
```

## Supporting systems

| System | Role | Links |
|--------|------|-------|
| Sample corpus | Queryable synthetic medical / salvage store | [Guide](../sample_document_corpus.md) · [Walkthrough](../notebooks/sample_document_corpus_walkthrough.ipynb) |
| Classical RF | TF-IDF + Random Forest baseline | [Notebook](../notebooks/random_forest_text_handwriting_classification.ipynb) |
| Discord (Chloride) | `/analyze` memo-chain front-end | [Usage](../usage.md) |
| Provenance | Synthetic-only disclosure | [Data Provenance](../data_provenance.md) |

::: {.see-also}
### See also
[Quick Start](../quick-start.qmd) · [Commands](../reference/commands.qmd) ·
[Implementation plan](../plan/plan.md)
:::
